title: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
description: AlexNet demonstrated that a deep convolutional neural network could dramatically outperform prior methods on ImageNet. Its 2012 breakthrough triggered the modern deep learning surge in computer vision by combining GPUs, ReLU-style activations, and dropout-style regularization.
highlights: Helped trigger the deep learning revolution

sources.title: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
